description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof covered in a textured, weathered material that resembles aged shingles or thatch. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, with log-style corner joints adding to its traditional appearance. The front facade features a central doorway flanked by two large, square windows, all of which lack glass or shutters, giving the cabin an open, unfinished look. The rear and side walls are solid, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing a simple, utilitarian design. The roof has a slight overhang, providing minimal protection from the elements. The overall structure is compact and robust, suitable for use as a small residential or utility building in an urban or park setting.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, log-style corners, and a central front door flanked by two large windows. The structure is compact, with weathered wood and a simple, traditional design.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from the rear, showing a solid wooden wall with no windows or doors, and the gable roof's peak.
description_view_1: The front view displays a central doorway and two large, square windows, with log-style corners and the gable roof overhead.
description_view_2: Another rear view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the solid wooden wall and the gable roof.
description_view_3: A side view reveals the long, windowless wall and the full length of the gable roof, with log-style corners visible.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a moderate pitch, covered in textured, weathered material resembling thatch or aged shingles, with slight overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: two large, square windows symmetrically placed on either side of the central front door; no windows visible on other sides
attribute_door_placement: single exterior door centered on the front facade, between the two windows
